Carlsen, Magnus (2840) - Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2708)
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [07] 2026.05.07
D02 Queen's pawn game, Krause variation

1.d4 d5 2.Nf3 c5 3.c4 dxc4 4.e4 cxd4 5.Qxd4 Qxd4 6.Nxd4 Bd7 7.Bxc4 Nc6 8.Be3 Nxd4 9.Bxd4 e6 10.f3 Ne7 11.Kf2 Nc6 12.Be3 Rc8 13.Nd2 Ne5 14.Be2 Bc5 15.Bxc5 Rxc5 16.Rhc1 Rxc1 17.Rxc1 Nc6 18.e5 Ke7 19.f4 Rc8 20.a3 f6 21.exf6+ gxf6 22.Rc3 Nd4 23.Rxc8 Bxc8 24.Bd3 h6 25.Ke3 Nc6 26.Nf3 b6 27.g4 e5 28.h3 Kd6 29.Nd2 exf4+ 30.Kxf4 Ne5 31.Bf5 Bb7 32.Bc2 Bg2 33.Kg3 Bd5 34.Kf4 Bg2 35.h4 Ke7 36.b3 Bh3 37.Bf5 Bg2 38.Ne4 Bxe4 39.Bxe4 Nf7 40.Bd5 Nd6 41.a4 Kd7 42.b4 Nc8 43.Ke4 Ne7 44.Kd4 f5 45.g5 hxg5 46.hxg5 Kd6 47.Bb7 Ng6 48.Kc4 Nf8 49.Bc8 Ne6 50.g6 Ke7 51.Kb5 f4 52.Ka6 f3 53.Kxa7 b5 54.g7 Nxg7 55.axb5 f2 56.Bh3 Ne6 57.b6 Nd4 58.b7 Nc6+ 59.Ka8
